testcase.name: initial app state is Playing
legal move updates board and switches active color
illegal move produces an error message and does not change board
undo after first move returns to initial board
undo on empty history shows error
ShowMoves highlights targets for a valid own piece
ShowMoves on empty square shows error
Flip toggles flipped flag
NewGame resets the game state
Quit sets running to false
draw offer then accept produces Draw status
run stops cleanly on EOF after initial render
run processes scripted input and re-renders until quit
run prints message when app provides one
Help command prints help text
Unknown command prints error message
Move on a finished game shows error
Pawn promotion required gives error if not provided
Check message is displayed when move results in check
Checkmate message is displayed winning move
Checkmate message is displayed when White wins
Checkmate against White
Stalemate message is properly triggered
Move parser invalid from

testcase.name: Stalemate message is displayed on stalemate
Draw message is displayed when game is drawn
ShowMoves for opponent's piece yields error
ShowMoves with no legal moves yields error
Undo successful message is displayed
Resign updates status to Checkmate and shows message
